tolerance_rules: Normalize whitespace, punctuation, and title casing before comparing publication titles.
Treat Daily Progress and Order Paper as sitting-day level sources and allow same-day publication lag between provisional and final pages.
Treat Weekly Journals and Sessional Journals as journal-ledger sources and compare on sitting week or sessional index scope rather than exact HTML/page presentation.
Treat Historic Journals of the House as volume-level archival evidence and compare on year, volume, and page references when present.
Treat Hansard as the canonical text record for debate-level reconciliation and compare against sitting date plus debate or item sequence.
Classify any source missing from the official inventory as unavailable rather than inferred.
next_actions: derive a sitting ledger from the normalized corpus extract
map each sitting ledger row to the best matching official source surface
generate missing, duplicate, partial, malformed, and unavailable gap reports
publish the reconciled coverage manifest only after the official comparison completes
notes: This artifact defines the comparison contract only.
It does not claim that the row-by-row historical reconciliation has already been executed.
